=== Linux users (uid 1000-65000) ===
  azureuser  uid=1000  home=/home/azureuser  shell=/bin/bash
  openclaw  uid=1001  home=/home/openclaw  shell=/bin/sh
  heather  uid=1002  home=/home/heather  shell=/bin/bash
  kaye  uid=1003  home=/home/kaye  shell=/bin/bash

=== heather-bot.service unit ===
# /etc/systemd/system/heather-bot.service
[Unit]
Description=Dr. Heather Yoo AI Agent Bot Endpoint (receive-only)
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=heather
WorkingDirectory=/home/heather
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/heather/heather-bot.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Environment=PORT=3984
Environment=HOME=/home/heather

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

=== heather-responder.service unit ===
# /etc/systemd/system/heather-responder.service
[Unit]
Description=Dr. Heather Yoo AI Agent autonomous responder
After=network.target heather-bot.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=heather
WorkingDirectory=/home/heather
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/heather/heather-responder.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Environment=HOME=/home/heather
Environment=PATH=/home/heather/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

=== Cameron service unit (compare) ===
# /etc/systemd/system/cameron-bot.service
[Unit]
Description=Cameron Claude Bot Endpoint
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=azureuser
WorkingDirectory=/home/azureuser
Environment=PORT=3999
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/azureuser/cameron-bot.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

--- responder ---
# /etc/systemd/system/cameron-responder.service
[Unit]
Description=Cameron Claude autonomous responder
After=cameron-bot.service network-online.target
Wants=cameron-bot.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=azureuser
WorkingDirectory=/home/azureuser
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/azureuser/cameron-responder.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
